text: Implement a custom workflow orchestration tool to automate repetitive tasks and ensure consistent, repeatable builds. This appends the 'docker-development' skill to the ci-cd-pipeline-builder, enabling seamless integration of Docker containerization into the CI/CD pipeline. This improves efficiency by reducing manual setup, ensuring environment consistency, and accelerating build cycles. The tool will automate dependency management, dependency security scanning, and build artifact validation, aligning with spec-driven workflows and reducing human error.
reason: This enhances build consistency, accelerates CI/CD, and reduces deployment risks by automating repetitive tasks, directly addressing the gaps in dependency management, security scanning, and validation within the existing plan.
